message.content: The game logo for "Labu Run" features a playful, cartoonish style. The text "LABU RUN" is displayed in a bold, rounded, 3D font with a white fill and red accents (dots inside letters, dripping effects). The letters are outlined in a vibrant green, giving a soft, pillowy appearance. Behind the text, there are two fluffy, light - colored (beige/cream) rabbit - like ears with red drips (resembling blood or a playful “messy” effect) on them. The color palette is bright and eye - catching, with green, white, and red as the main colors, creating a whimsical and energetic vibe.
